summary: Iteration-001 blocker (vacuous Arm 3 malformed test) is genuinely resolved — re-ran the rewritten Arm 3 against the live barrel AND ran the fabricated/bypassed variant to confirm the non-vacuity assertions actually catch a vacuous case (fails 2/2). Both minor issues fixed. No regressions in previously-solid parts. APPROVE.
blocker_resolution_verified: Re-ran real Arm 3 (name=42 + contract): (contract r25:call-tool-request-params/c (r25:json->call-tool-request-params (hasheq 'name 42 'arguments (hasheq))) 'demo 'demo) RAISES a string? contract violation; exn->jsonrpc-error-jsexpr maps it to code=-32603; message begins 'contract violation\n expected: string?\n given: 42'. All assertions pass on the genuine rejection.

Re-ran the fabricated variant (guard fires): message='s1-demo: contract unexpectedly accepted...'; (check-true #rx"contract violation") FAILS and (check-false #rx"unexpectedly accepted") FAILS — the vacuous case fails 2/2, so the not-fabricated assertions provably cannot be fooled.

Both bindings reachable through mcp/core/main.rkt (verified live): (procedure? r25:json->call-tool-request-params)=#t, (contract? r25:call-tool-request-params/c)=#t; both present in BOTH only-in lists (item.md:266,568).

err-obj can ONLY be bound from the (contract …) raise; the guard (error …) at item.md:620 is positioned after the contract call, and if it ever produces err-obj the regexp assertions trip. Structurally non-vacuous now.
minor_fixes_verified: jsexpr=? now has [(and (number? a)(number? b)) (= a b)] with correct citation spec-2025-11-25-test.rkt:54 (item.md:585); 'same semantics' claim now accurate.

Asserted '908' replaced with '<to confirm — item 008 recorded 908>' placeholders in Test-commands/Validation/Expected (item.md:856,873,889,893,905,908); remaining literal 908 mentions are legitimate baseline-instruction context (item.md:372,494,795).
no_regression: Round-trip arms 1/2/4: byte-identical to the iteration-001 sketch already verified passing.
Parity-matrix resolution: still edits progress.md:336, no roadmap table, partial not done.
progress.md line numbers (header :41, overview :27, test line :53, boxes :56-62, G1 :298) still accurate (progress.md untouched).
G1 over-claim guard, demo location (no collision), fixture reuse all intact.
